assertions.title: Undo reverts a single field edit

steps.action: Edit employee name 'UndoA IC' to 'UndoA IC Edited' in Org Chart
steps.expected: Name updates and undo becomes available
Name reverts to original and undo persists to backend
steps.observed: Name reverted to 'UndoA IC'; captured PATCH 200 for edit and PATCH 200 for undo

evidence.consoleErrors: 3x 'Request failed with status code 400' observed from earlier invalid setup submissions; no new undo-specific console error

steps.expected: Employee appears and total count increments
steps.observed: Employee appeared in Org Chart; total changed from 3 to 4

steps.expected: Added employee disappears from Org Chart and other views; count decrements
steps.observed: Employee removed from Org Chart, Hierarchy, Spreadsheet; total returned to 3

steps.action: Cmd+Click 'UndoA IC' then use Delete Selected and confirm dialog
steps.observed: Delete confirmation modal appeared; employee removed; total dropped to 2

steps.expected: Employee restored with original fields and manager relationship
steps.observed: Employee restored with name/title/department and hierarchy restored (UndoA Leader back to (2) reports)

evidence.network: DELETE /api/employees/69e19a0b2bce4b5d491176dc, then undo issued POST /api/scenarios/69e199b72bce4b5d4911768a/employees (captured in browser network requests)

assertions.title: Undo reverts manager reassignment

steps.action: Attempt drag reassignment in Org Chart (selector drag, mouse drag with confirm handler)
Attempt keyboard drag in Hierarchy view

evidence.network: No /api/employees/*/move requests observed despite drag attempts

assertions.issues: Blocked: manager reassignment drag could not be triggered through agent-browser interactions (mouse, selector drag, or hierarchy keyboard drag), so undo behavior for reassignment could not be validated.

assertions.title: Multiple sequential undos in reverse chronological order

steps.action: Perform 3 changes in order: title edit, department edit, employee add
steps.observed: Title changed to EM Lead, department changed to Product, employee 'UndoA Seq Add' added
Title reverted EM Lead -> Engineering Manager

evidence.network: PATCH /api/employees/69e19a0a2bce4b5d491176d8 -> 200, PATCH /api/employees/69e19b1a2bce4b5d49117726 -> 200, POST /api/scenarios/69e199b72bce4b5d4911768a/employees -> 201, DELETE /api/employees/69e19cb22bce4b5d49117750 -> 200, PATCH /api/employees/69e19b1a2bce4b5d49117726 -> 200, PATCH /api/employees/69e19a0a2bce4b5d491176d8 -> 200

steps.action: Edit title from original to 'Redo Title'

frictions.description: agent-browser 'network requests' output does not consistently include response status codes needed for evidence detail.
frictions.resolution: Added temporary in-page XHR/fetch logging via agent-browser eval to capture method+URL+status for key assertions.

frictions.description: Occasional 'element blocked'/'timed out' when continuing long chained inline-edit interactions.
frictions.resolution: Recovered with fresh snapshot and page reload, then resumed deterministic step-by-step interactions.

blockers.description: Manager reassignment drag did not trigger through available automation interactions (selector drag, mouse drag, hierarchy keyboard drag).
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Tried Org Chart drag with dialog accept, manual mouse drag using node coordinates, and Hierarchy keyboard drag; verified no /move network calls and no hierarchy change.

summary: Tested 6 assertions: 5 passed, 0 failed, 1 blocked (VAL-UNDO-004 due to non-triggering manager-drag reassignment in automation).
